Bootcamp & Workshops

Beyond the Classroom —
Compete, Build & Innovate

From hackathons to competitions, our bootcamps and workshops give students the platform to apply their skills, challenge themselves and grow beyond the regular curriculum.

Competition Training

Prepare for WRO, FLL and national robotics olympiads with expert coaching and practice matches.

Hackathons

Time-bound innovation challenges where students solve real-world problems with technology.

Holiday Workshops

Intensive weekend and holiday workshops covering specific technology themes and skills.

Project Exhibitions

Showcase student projects to parents, industry professionals and the wider community.

Personalised Projects

One-on-one guided project work tailored to each student's interest and program level.

Demo Sessions

Try-before-you-join sessions — hands-on 45-minute tasters for prospective students.

Upcoming Events — Coming Soon

Our bootcamp and workshop schedule is being finalised. Register your interest and we'll notify you when dates are announced.

Register Interest →
Free Demo Session

Not sure which program is right
for your child?

Book a Free Demo Session — experience the lab, meet the mentors and let your child try a hands-on session before you decide anything.

Book Free Demo — It's Completely Free

Seats fill fast · Vadodara only · No commitment required

Vadodara's full-fledged AI, Robotics & Coding centre for ages 4–14, built around hands-on learning, smart labs and real technology exposure.

Programs

  • Foundation of Robotics L1 (7–10)
  • Advanced Robotics L2 (7–10)
  • Core Robotics & Coding (11–14)
  • Advanced Robotics & IoT (11–14)
